title: CVE-2026-8725: CoreWorxLab CAAL RCE
summary: [P1] A weakness in CoreWorxLab CAAL up to 1.6.0 allows for potential RCE, with no patch available. Exploitation in the wild has not been reported, but the lack of a patch makes it a high-risk item. Why now: Lack of available patch for CoreWorxLab CAAL vulnerability. (confidence: 0.80)
classification_reasoning: RCE vulnerability in CoreWorxLab CAAL framework.
